Advanced study of Enclave technology allows for the production of their sophisticated scientific equipment and combat armor with integrated systems.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Enclave_Advanced_Plasma_Wea: Military holotape containing the schematics and manufacturing processes for the Enclave Advanced Plasma Weapons.
Holotape File: Enclave Advanced Plasma Weapons
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Enclave_Advanced_Power_Armo: Military holotape containing the schematics and manufacturing processes for the Enclave Advanced Power Armor. This cutting-edge armor represents the pinnacle of pre-war engineering, offering exceptional protection and mobility.
Holotape File: Enclave Advanced Power Armor

Military holotape containing the schematics and manufacturing processes for the Enclave Advanced Power Armor MkII. This improved variant features enhanced environmental sealing and durability for prolonged combat scenarios.
Holotape File: Enclave Advanced Power Armor MkII
LanguageData.FCP_Research_Enclave_Basic_Equipment.des: Study captured Enclave equipment to understand their manufacturing techniques and replicate basic uniforms and equipment used by Enclave personnel.
